title: Agricultural market price CSV snapshot row

source.description: Stable short identifier for the publisher or feed.

source_record_id.description: Identifier published by the source, or empty when none is available.

name.description: Product name preserved as published by the source.

location.description: Location preserved as published by the source.

marketplace.description: Specific market preserved as published by the source.

market_chain_level.description: Documented trading tier; unspecified means the source does not state one.

min_price.description: Non-negative decimal encoded as CSV text, or empty when unavailable.

max_price.description: Non-negative decimal encoded as CSV text, or empty when unavailable.

modal_price.description: Non-negative modal or single representative price, or empty when unavailable.

currency.description: Currency code as published or unambiguously documented by the source.

observed_at.description: When the source says the market price applies.

collected_at.description: When this repository collected the record.

source_url.description: Page or file from which the record was collected.
